warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
10 x Inch Worms
10 I-Y-T-W
10 Leg Raise holding rig
Wrist Mobilisation
gymnastics:
T2B Bar Progression
1-2 mins False Grip on bar - focus on Knuckles Up (00:00)
EMOM x 3 (02:00)
10 x Beat Swing - Tight Shapes
EMOM x 3 (05:00)
Jump Into Hollow/Arch x 10
EMOM x 4 (08:00)
Bigger Beat Swing - Push Down on Bar
- Put Ball between feet - Reach Long in the Arch - Dont bend the knees
EMOM x 4 (11:00)
Knees to Chest - Aggressive & Pop - pause
EMOM x 5 (15:00-20:00)
Beat Swing with Straight legs - to target
Aim for height without losing tension.
Ring Dip Progression
EMOM x4 - 30 Second Hold to Support - Rings or Parrallete (20:00)
EMOM x 4 Bench Dips x 10 (24:00)
EMOM x 4 Banded Dips (28:00)
EMOM x 4 Strict Dips (32:00)
EMOM x 4 Kipping Dip Practice (36:00-40:00)

hypertrophy.reasoning: T2B and ring dips heavily tax chest, shoulders, triceps, and pulling strength; target opposing muscle groups.

siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: T2B Bar Progression. Metcon: Workout: 10 T2B, 8 Ring Dip, 12/10cals AB. For hypertrophy, focus on back (rows), rear delts, biceps.
